ohtani.title: Dodgers flirt with combined no-hitter in 4-1 win
ohtani.blurb: Shohei Ohtani hits a leadoff homer and tosses six no-hit innings as the Dodgers flirt with a combined no-hitter in 4-1 win over the Rockies

imanaga.title: Astros' three homers ignite 8-5 win over Cubs
imanaga.blurb: Jake Meyers, Nick Allen and Christian Walker's home runs power Astros' 8-5 win over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Ian Happ's five RBIs power Cubs to 10-4 win
suzuki.blurb: Ian Happ racks up five RBIs and sparks an electric six-run rally in the 7th inning in the Cubs' 10-4 win over the Pirates\n

yoshida.title: Duran, Early lead Red Sox to an 8-0 win over Braves
yoshida.blurb: Jarren Duran homers in a four-hit game and Connelly Early tosses seven scoreless frames to lead the Red Sox to a 8-0 win over the Braves

okamoto.title: Kazuma Okamoto hits go-ahead homer in Blue Jays' win
okamoto.blurb: Kazuma Okamoto hits a go-ahead home run in the Blue Jays' 2-1 victory over the Marlins

murakami.title: Meidroth, Murakami homers lead White Sox to 15-2 win
murakami.blurb: Back-to-back homers from Chase Meidroth and Munetaka Murakami, plus David Dandlin's impressive debut leads the White Sox a 15-2 win

matsui.title: Kyle Schwarber hits 21st homer in Phillies' 3-0 win
matsui.blurb: Kyle Schwarber hits his 21st homer and Jesús Luzardo strikes out six in the Phillies' 3-0 win over the Padres
